svg.title: Atlas Platform — Milestone 1 Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing a Go/Chi REST API server receiving HTTP requests, with a health endpoint, and future components like database, Docker, Kubernetes, and observability shown as upcoming layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of clients call the Atlas Platform API?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Go Chi REST API server in Atlas Platform')
sendPrompt('How will PostgreSQL be added to Atlas Platform?')
sendPrompt('How will Docker be used in Atlas Platform?')
sendPrompt('How will Kubernetes be set up in Atlas Platform?')
sendPrompt('What observability stack will Atlas Platform use?')
